assertions.issues: Browser automation tool failed due to missing system dependencies (libatk-1.0.so.0). Manual testing required.

frictions.description: Browser tool (agent-browser) could not launch due to missing libatk-1.0.so.0 library on the system
frictions.resolution: Attempted 'agent-browser install --with-deps' but requires sudo which is not available in this environment

blockers.description: agent-browser cannot launch Chromium due to missing libatk-1.0.so.0 shared library. System dependencies installation requires sudo permissions which are not available.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried agent-browser install --with-deps, but sudo authentication required. Attempted curl for API testing but TanStack Start SSR requires browser context.

summary: Assertion VAL-ASSESS-003 blocked due to browser tool dependencies. Code analysis confirms assessment take form implements all required question type renderings: single_choice (radio), multiple_choice (checkbox), short_text (input), long_text (textarea), rating (1-5 buttons), boolean (Yes/No radio), date (date picker). Navigation between questions via Previous/Next buttons is implemented with progress bar. Manual browser testing required to visually verify rendering.
